_comment: BUILD LOG (append-only), auto-written by `mailwoman gazetteer build admin` — what ran, when, verify result, md5. The RECIPE lives in code: mailwoman/gazetteer-pipeline/defaults.ts (reviewed like code; no more reconstruct-from-artifact, #1015). The build_command/post_build/overture/geonames sections below are HISTORICAL records of the pre-CLI era.
post_build: Three steps, IN ORDER (steps 1-2 were missing pre-2026-06-08; see docs/articles/evals/2026-06-08-honest-eval.md + #440). STEP 1: node scripts/add-region-abbrevs.ts /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/wof/admin-global-priority.db   (enriches `names` with state/province abbreviations from chromium-i18n libaddressinput so findPlace('VT') resolves to Vermont; without it the region parent-constraint never engages and locality lookup runs unconstrained US-wide). STEP 2: node scripts/backfill-ancestors-from-hierarchy.ts /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/wof/admin-global-priority.db   (repairs only-self ancestry for multi/ambiguous-parent places — e.g. NYC, parent_id=-4 — from wof:hierarchy, so the region-descendant boost can reach them; without it region resolution regresses metros like NYC -> 'New York Mills'). STEP 3: node resolver-wof-sqlite/out/build-fts-cli.js /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/wof/admin-global-priority.db   (builds place_search FTS5 INCLUDING the step-1 abbreviations + place_bbox R*Tree). Step 1 must precede step 3 (FTS reads `names`); step 2 is independent of FTS.

repos.name: whosonfirst-data-admin-nl
repos._added: 2026-06-04 for the coordinate-first postcode→locality work (NL coord-first now resolves)

expected_output._comment: Rebuilt 2026-06-04 to add ES/IT/NL (coordinate-first). DE/FR/GB locality counts unchanged (12657/57260/16813); DE PIP-containment held at 92.6%.

overture_divisions_supplement._comment: 2026-06-20: the canonical admin DB gained coverage for 15 zero-DB EU locales the WOF repos don't carry, sourced from the Overture Maps `divisions` theme and folded into the SAME build via build-unified-wof.ts --overture-countries (project-eu-coverage-not-retrain; docs/articles/plan/2026-06-19-coordinate-leverage-sprint.md). Coordinate p50 solved for 14/15 at ES/IT/NL parity, zero GPU. Rows carry synthetic ids based at 8e12 (no collision with WOF ids <~2e9); the post-build + FTS steps treat them uniformly. NOT the off-the-shelf Overture-everything — only divisions for these locales, alongside the custom WOF DB.
overture_divisions_supplement.build_command: node scripts/build-unified-wof.ts --data /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/wof/repos/whosonfirst-data --overture-countries PT,PL,BE,AT,CH,CZ,DK,NO,FI,SK,SI,HR,LU,LV,LT --output <out>.db  (then the same 3 post_build steps IN ORDER)
overture_divisions_supplement.also_added: TW (16,750 localities) from the sibling whosonfirst-data-admin-tw repo — a previously-deferred gap, additive, Taipei resolves.
overture_divisions_supplement.verified: US resolver eval byte-identical to the pre-swap shipped DB (loc 97.6% / region 99.9% / coord p50 3.3km); priority-country locality counts unchanged; 184 region abbrevs unchanged.
overture_divisions_supplement.bbox_source: type=division_area (real boundary extent); #1015 — type=division carries only a degenerate label-point bbox

postcode_build._comment: US postcodes live in a SEPARATE shard DB (the resolver routes postalcode queries to it via multi-shard ATTACH). Built with the same build-unified-wof.ts using --placetypes postalcode.
postcode_build.post_build: Three steps, IN ORDER. STEP 1: node resolver-wof-sqlite/out/build-fts-cli.js /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/wof/postalcode-us.db   (FTS + R*Tree). STEP 2: node scripts/fill-zcta-centroids.ts   (#525 pass 1: fills (0,0)-placeholder centroids from the Census ZCTA Gazetteer — /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/census/README.md — stamping per-row provenance in `centroid_source` as `census-zcta-2024`; never overwrites a real WOF coordinate; residual ~10% are PO-box/unique ZIPs with no ZCTA). STEP 3 (optional, requires US.txt): node scripts/fill-zcta-centroids.ts --geonames /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/geonames/US.txt   (#525 pass 2: fills remaining (0,0) rows from GeoNames US postal file — download.geonames.org/export/zip/US.zip, CC-BY 4.0, attribute 'GeoNames (CC-BY 4.0)' in any artifact that ships these rows — stamping provenance as `geonames-us`; covers some PO-box/unique ZIPs not in ZCTA; idempotent, re-checks latitude=0). US.txt absent = step silently skipped (ZCTA residuals stay placeholder).
postcode_build.resolver_wiring: ResolveRouter + WofSqlitePlaceLookup take both DBs (admin-global-priority.db, postalcode-us.db); postalcode queries route to the postcode shard.

postcode_build_gb._comment: GB postcodes for the coordinate-first postcode→locality table (acquired from source 2026-06-04). 2.72M unit postcodes; geojson is committed directly (only meta CSVs are LFS).

postcode_locality_asset._comment: Coordinate-first candidate table (postcode → containing + nearby WOF localities). Read-only distributable asset; see resolver-wof-sqlite/POSTCODE-LOCALITY.md.
postcode_locality_asset.build: node scripts/build-postcode-locality.ts --country <CC> --admin-repo <admin-<cc>> --postcode-db <postalcode source> --output postcode-locality-intl.db  (per country), then --finalize

notes: admin-fr was missing from the cloned repos when this manifest was created (only the built admin-fr.db artifact remained); re-cloned 2026-05-30 at the commit above.
Clones are shallow (git clone --depth 1) for the data; the commit hash still pins the snapshot.
Postcodes: US (admin shard) + GB (postcode-build-gb) + DE/ES/FR/IT/NL (postalcode-intl.db) for the coordinate-first table.

2026-06-04: rebuilt admin-global-priority.db to add ES/IT/NL localities (NL coord-first now resolves). DE/FR/GB unchanged + DE PIP-containment held at 92.6% (no regression). Prior DB backed up as admin-global-priority.db.pre-nl-bak.

2026-06-20: swapped in the Overture-divisions supplement (see overture_divisions_supplement) — +15 EU locales (299,027 divisions) + TW (16,750). US resolver eval byte-identical to the prior DB; priority counts + 184 abbrevs unchanged. Prior DB backed up as admin-global-priority.db.pre-overture-eu-bak.

2026-07-07 (#1015): reverse geocoding crossed borders (Brussels->NL) because Overture-backfilled places had DEGENERATE point bboxes (read from type=division) and no country node. Fix: read real extents from type=division_area + add the country subtype (OVERTURE_DIVISION_SUBTYPES). Also fixed a build stall: the wof:hierarchy -4 backfill now skips synthetic ids (>=8e12) — they have no wof:hierarchy geojson, so probing millions of them was ~40min of waste. Recipe widened to 86 Overture + 161 GeoNames countries (reconstructed from the live DB by synthetic-id range; the manifest had lagged at the original 15). --data is the repos PARENT (US/TW admin are sibling repos).
2026-07-07: gazetteer build admin — 1,806,696 WOF + 1,871,483 overture@2026-06-17.0 + 772,507 geonames; verify PASS; sealed; md5 f639aa52; /mnt/playpen/mailwoman-data/wof/admin-global-priority.PRC.db

2026-07-07: SWAPPED the cured build live (fixes #1026) — admin-global-priority.PRC.db → admin-global-priority.db; prior live kept as .pre-1026-bak. Post-swap `gazetteer verify` PASS 21/21. Country nodes 97→237, regions +1691 (GeoNames gap-set admin fold, PR #1028).

2026-07-07: candidate rebuilt from the CURED admin via `gazetteer build candidate --no-fold` (the 161-country fold is inside buildAdmin now) → candidate-global-1026.db (12,160,584 rows, +1.96M vs 920; 244 countries; sealed). candidate.db symlink repointed; photon restarted; live smoke green (Tbilisi/Berlin/Springfield forward, Brussels reverse). R2/demo publish deferred to the next `gazetteer release`.

postcode_locality_cjk._comment: CJK postcode→locality via authoritative NAME-MATCH (not PIP — WOF CJK has no municipality polygons). Same postcode_locality table, consumed by the same postcode_area_resolution strategy. See resolver-wof-sqlite/POSTCODE-LOCALITY.md (CJK section) + docs/articles/evals/2026-06-05-cjk-arena.md.
postcode_locality_cjk.build: node scripts/build-postcode-locality-cjk.ts --country JP --postal-names KEN_ALL_ROME.CSV --geonames geonames/JP.txt --admin-db admin-global-priority.db --output postcode-locality-jp.db ; then merge into postcode-locality-intl.db

postal_authority.JP: KEN_ALL_ROME.zip (Japan Post, romanized) — CP932/Shift-JIS. Japan Post BLOCKS programmatic download (JS/geo-gated); fetch manually via browser: download.html → /zipcode/dl/roman-zip.html → roman/KEN_ALL_ROME.zip
postal_authority.KR: deferred — Juso.go.kr / Korea Post (login/geo-walled); GeoNames KR is Hangul vs WOF romaji
postal_authority.TW: deferred — no GeoNames postal; TW not yet in admin DB (admin-tw clone present)

postcode_locality_cjk.points_source: GeoNames postal (geonames/JP.txt, geonames/KR.txt) — already an in-project source for DE/ES/IT/NL

geonames_supplement._comment: 2026-07: GeoNames alias-fold tail (bilingual/alt-name coverage), --geonames-countries; ids @ 9e12. Reconstructed from the live artifact when this manifest lagged (the widened Jul-2026 build was never recorded here).
